reviews.comment:
Instalaciones inadecuadas para la cantidda de clintes. Mucho tiempo de espera. Fuera hay un food truck que tampoco alcanza y no se repone los alimentos con la misma velicidad a la q se vende. Es posible hacer 20 minutos de cola y que no haya promociones o que falten hamburguesas

(Translated by Google)
The facilities are inadequate for the number of customers. There are long wait times. Outside, there's a food truck, but it's also insufficient, and the food isn't replenished as quickly as it's sold. You can wait in line for 20 minutes and find there are no promotions or that they're out of burgers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURReS03VGNREAE
